# Growth Context

*Last updated: 2026-06-21*
*Status: DRAFT auto-generated by `growth init`. Confirm the ⚠️ flags before publishing anything from it.*

## Product
- **Name:** MediaBrief
- **One-liner:** Self-hosted tool that turns any media link into a clean transcript and AI summary.
- **What it does:** Paste a link from YouTube, Bilibili, TikTok, Apple Podcasts, SoundCloud, and 30+ more (via yt-dlp), or drop a local audio/video/text file. MediaBrief pulls existing subtitles when available, falls back to Faster-Whisper transcription when they're not, then cleans up and summarizes the text with your configured LLM. Summaries stream in first while the full transcript refines in the background. Built-in RSS automation (including YouTube channel feeds) handles recurring sources. Runs as a self-hosted web app.
- **Category:** self-hosted media transcription + AI summary web app

## Platform & distribution
- **Platform / requirements:** Python 3.12+ backend (FastAPI/uvicorn + SQLite), Node/pnpm frontend (Vite). FFmpeg and yt-dlp required (bundled binaries present). Whisper via Faster-Whisper (CTranslate2). Bring your own OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint.
- **How it ships / installs:** Docker (`Dockerfile` + `docker-compose.yml`), install scripts (`install.sh` / `install.ps1` / `install.bat`), or run from source. Self-hosted; not a cloud service.
- **Updates:** Manual (git pull / rebuild Docker image). No in-app self-update.
- **Repo:** https://github.com/EvilIrving/mediabrief
- **Site:** ⚠️ none captured — confirm if a landing page / GitHub Pages exists.

## Pricing model
- Free and open source under the **MIT License** (`LICENSE` file and README badge agree).
- **Bring-your-own-model**: the user supplies their own OpenAI-compatible API key (OpenAI, OpenRouter, local LLM), so they bear inference cost; MediaBrief itself is free. No tiers, no SaaS.

## Audience
- **Who it's for:** content consumers, researchers, learners, and podcast listeners who want a readable transcript and summary instead of watching/listening end to end. Secondary: RSS power users who subscribe to feeds and batch-summarize episodes; self-hosters and privacy-minded users who want local processing with their own model.
- **Why they reach for it:** read instead of watch/listen; a fast pipeline (summary in seconds for subtitle mode, single-digit minutes for Whisper); local-first and private; automate recurring feeds; keep control of which LLM and key are used.

## Differentiators (ranked, all true)
1. **Subtitles-first:** pulls existing captions without downloading audio at all; Whisper only runs when no subtitles exist. Saves significant time and compute on most YouTube content.
2. **Summary-first streaming:** the summary streams in while the transcript is still being cleaned up, so the wait feels instant even when it isn't.
3. **RSS automation incl. YouTube channels:** subscribe to feeds or channels and summarize/download new items on a schedule. Few summarizers do recurring automation.
4. **Bring-your-own-model:** any OpenAI-compatible API (OpenAI, OpenRouter, local), configured in the UI with model discovery. No vendor lock-in, no per-summary SaaS fee.
5. **Self-hosted and private:** runs on your own machine, history stored in local SQLite, no third-party cloud in the path.
6. **Broad input + export:** 30+ platforms via yt-dlp plus local `.mp3/.mp4/.m4a/.wav/.webm/.mkv/.ogg/.flac/.txt`; export to MD, TXT, DOCX, PDF.

## Competitors / alternatives
⚠️ Verify each before publishing a comparison; feature sets and pricing change.
| Name | Model | Honest strength | How we differ |
|------|-------|-----------------|---------------|
| Otter.ai / cloud transcription SaaS | Paid SaaS | Polished, real-time, collaboration features | MediaBrief is free, self-hosted, BYO-model, and works from links across 30+ platforms, not just uploads/meetings. |
| "Summarize YouTube" GPT tools / browser extensions | Free/freemium SaaS | Zero setup, instant in-browser | MediaBrief handles 30+ platforms + local files + RSS, runs locally, and keeps full transcripts and history. |
| Whisper / whisper.cpp (raw) | Free OSS | Best-in-class local transcription | MediaBrief adds a UI, subtitle-first shortcut, LLM cleanup + summary, RSS, and exports on top of transcription. |
| whishper / self-hosted transcribers | Free OSS, self-hosted | Direct self-hosted peer | ⚠️ confirm current feature set; differentiate on summary-first streaming, RSS incl. channels, and BYO-model. |

## Voice
- **Tone:** efficient, capable, unobtrusive (per PRODUCT.md). Direct, technical but not cold. No marketing superlatives, no emoji overuse. Like a sharp tool that does the job and gets out of the way.
- **Words to use / avoid:** use concrete pipeline language (subtitle-first, summary-first, self-hosted, BYO-model, 30+ platforms). Avoid SaaS marketing language, "magic ✨", inflated numbers, fake social proof, and vague claims like "powerful" or "revolutionary."
